# Aleksei Bykovskii — Portfolio

> Senior Frontend Engineer with 5+ years building and scaling product-focused React/TypeScript applications. Available for remote opportunities.

## About

- Name: Aleksei Bykovskii
- Role: Senior Frontend Engineer
- Location: Remote
- Email: aybykovskii@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/aybykovskii
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/aybykovskii/

## Skills

Core: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Next.js, Astro
Styling: Tailwind CSS, SCSS
State: Redux, Redux Toolkit, React Query
Testing: Vitest, Jest
Backend: Node.js, Express, Hono
Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Convex
Infrastructure: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Cloudflare

## Experience

**Senior Frontend Developer — 42 LLC (2021 – present, Remote)**
Moscow Electronic School (MES) — government-scale education platform used by millions of students across Moscow.
- TypeScript migration across 5 projects, 1,000+ components updated
- Architected and shipped a Coursera-style course platform within MES
- Unified ESLint/dprint config across 5+ projects
- Led Redux Toolkit migration, cut sprint cycle time by ~40%
- Mentored 5 engineers to mid-level within 24 months

**Middle Frontend Developer — Urban IT (2020 – 2021, Remote)**
Civic tech startup: crowdsourced cleanliness-rating platform for residential areas in Khabarovsk.
- Built React/TypeScript frontend with interactive Yandex Maps integration
- Integrated Redux; contributed to Node.js/MongoDB backend

**Web Developer — Freelance (2019 – 2020, Remote)**
~100 client projects over 12 months — UI fixes, components, full landing pages.

## Projects

**Daaspil Digital Store** — https://daaspil.com
Conversion-focused landing page for an Instagram creator selling digital guidebooks. Integrated Robokassa payment API. Built on Astro with self-hosted Convex, AWS S3, and CloudFront; sub-second load times. Full infrastructure ownership.
Stack: React, Astro, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Convex

**Guidegram** — https://github.com/toro-devs/guidegram-preview
Production Telegram commerce bot for selling digital products. Integrated YooKassa and Robokassa payment APIs. Discount and segmented broadcast features. Full infrastructure ownership.
Stack: TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis

**Baby Vita Dent** — https://babyvitadent.ru
Full-stack web platform for a Moscow dental clinic network (~5,000 monthly users). End-to-end appointment booking with Telegram bot confirmations. Delivered in 6 months by a 2-person team.
Stack: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB
